name: znetwork_dplay_close_release_and_couninitialize
description: zNetwork_DPlay::CloseReleaseAndCoUninitialize calls DirectPlay Close and Release when an interface is present, calls CoUninitialize, and returns the Release count or zero for null.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?CloseReleaseAndCoUninitialize@zNetwork_DPlay@@YIHPAUzNetwork_DPlay4@@@Z at 0x48b7f0 still fails: 9 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 13 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 35 bytes, VC object symbol size 48 bytes.
The native smoke verifies the non-null Close/Release vtable calls, Release return value propagation, and the null-interface zero return.
